description: Real-time outbreak notifications from CDC including foodborne, parasitic, and bacterial outbreaks

extraction.description: Use Bedrock to extract structured data from linked CDC outbreak investigation pages

notes.sla: None — public CDC feed, no uptime guarantee
notes.update_frequency: Near-real-time (CDC posts as outbreaks are announced or updated)
notes.coverage: All CDC-tracked multistate outbreaks (Salmonella, E. coli, Listeria, Cyclospora, Botulism, etc.)
notes.risk: RSS feed structure is stable (standard RSS 2.0). Linked HTML pages may change layout.
